meta.title: Marco — Full Stack Developer & AI Engineer | Upwork
meta.description: Freelance Full Stack developer and AI automation specialist on Upwork. I help startups and SaaS companies ship faster with modern web apps and intelligent workflows.

hero.label: Full Stack Developer & AI Engineer
hero.headline: I Build Apps & AI Pipelines for Startups
hero.description: Freelance developer on Upwork — I help startup and SaaS teams ship full-stack web apps and AI automation workflows, fast and production-ready.

problems.label: Sound familiar?
problems.headline: Building a startup is hard enough
problems.description: You shouldn't be held back by tech debt, slow delivery, or manual processes

website.title: Need to ship your MVP — yesterday?
website.description: Investors and early users won't wait. Every week without a working product is a week of lost traction, feedback, and revenue.

solution.title: Fast, production-ready apps
solution.description: I build full-stack web apps with Astro, React, and FastAPI — from design to deployment. Clean code, tested, ready to scale.

time.title: Drowning in manual, repetitive work?
time.description: Your team is spending hours on tasks that should run themselves — data entry, follow-ups, report generation. That's time and money wasted.

solution.title: AI & automation pipelines
solution.description: I build n8n workflows and AI pipelines that eliminate manual work. Connect your tools, automate your processes, and reclaim your team's time.

tech.title: Outgrown your current tech stack?
tech.description: Your prototype worked — but it can't scale. Slow performance, mounting debt, and features that take weeks instead of days.

solution.title: Scalable architecture & refactoring
solution.description: I audit your codebase, identify bottlenecks, and refactor for performance and maintainability — so you can keep shipping fast.

services.label: What I do
services.headline: Full Stack & AI — production-ready.
services.description: Two core services for startups that need to ship fast and scale smart

web.title: Web apps your users will love
web.description: From landing pages to complex SaaS dashboards — I build fast, scalable, and maintainable web applications using modern frameworks.
features: React, Astro, Next.js — right tool for the job
FastAPI / Node.js backend with proper auth
PostgreSQL, Supabase, or your preferred DB

automation.title: Let AI handle the repetitive work
automation.description: I build intelligent pipelines that connect your tools, automate workflows, and add AI capabilities to your product.

consulting.title: Technical strategy for founders
consulting.description: Not sure which stack to choose or how to architect your system? I help founders make the right technical decisions early.

process.label: The process
process.headline: Simple. Async. No surprises.
process.description: From first message to shipped product — here's how we work together via Upwork

1.title: Intro call
1.description: We start with a free 30-minute call to align on your goals, constraints, and timeline. I ask the right questions before writing a single line of code.

2.title: Build & iterate
2.description: I work async-first with regular updates. You get working previews early and often — no big-bang deliveries, no surprises.

3.title: Ship & support
3.description: We deploy together, I handle the handoff, and I remain available for questions, fixes, and follow-on work — all through Upwork.

about.headline: Hi, I'm Marco
paragraphs: I'm a freelance Full Stack developer and AI engineer, available worldwide via Upwork. I specialize in building production-ready web applications and AI automation pipelines for startups and SaaS companies.

My approach is simple: understand the problem deeply, build the right solution, ship fast. I write clean, tested, maintainable code — and I communicate clearly throughout the project so there are no surprises.

I work async-first, which means I fit naturally into remote teams across any timezone. Whether you need a full MVP, a new feature, or an automation that saves your team hours every week — I'm here to help.

contact.headline: Ready to build something great?
contact.description: Send me a message on Upwork or use the form below — I respond within 24 hours.

success.title: Thank you!
success.message: I've received your message and will get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Building web apps and AI pipelines for startups worldwide.
